name: Soyuz-FG / Fregat
first: The launcher that put every Mars Express, Cluster, and ESA-Roscosmos joint misija on its way
description: Soyuz-FG (now retired) plus the Fregat upper stage — the standard ESA-Roscosmos pairing for medium interplanetary misije. The cryogenic-free design uses kerosene-LOX in the lower stages and Fregat's restartable hypergolic propellants for precise injection. Launched ESA's Mars Express (2003), the Cluster magnetospheric quartet, and most pre-Soyuz-2 ISS resupply flights.
